health.voiceSource: VYVA keeps an eye on your health
health.headline: How are you feeling?

seeDoctor.title: See a Doctor

seeDoctor.checkSymptomsSub: AI triage + vitals scan in 5 minutes

intro.title: Check Your Symptoms
intro.subtitle: A quick, private health check — guided by AI and done on your phone in minutes.
intro.step1Desc: Camera measures your heart rate — no wearable needed
intro.step2Desc: Chat with VYVA about how you're feeling
intro.step3Desc: Receive a summary you can share with your doctor

scan.title: Vitals Scan
scan.instruction: Look at the camera and stay still — we're reading your pulse
scan.permissionHint: Please allow camera access in your browser settings to use the vitals scan.

chat.title: Tell VYVA
chat.errorMsg: I'm sorry, I had trouble understanding that. Could you try again?

report.title: Your Report
report.copiedToastDesc: Share the text with your doctor or family.
report.disclaimer: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.

scanWound.title: Scan My Wound
scanWound.subtitle: Take or upload a photo for AI analysis
scanWound.advice: Minor abrasion detected. Keep the area clean and covered. Change dressing daily and monitor for signs of infection.
scanWound.disclaimer: This is for guidance only. Always seek professional care for serious injuries.
scanWound.errorAdvice: We were unable to analyse the image right now. Please try again, or if you are concerned, contact a healthcare professional.

advance1.title: Walking 7,000 steps a day cuts heart risk by 50%
advance1.blurb: New research confirms a daily walk can be as effective as medication for many seniors.

advance2.title: Gene therapy shows promise for age-related hearing loss
advance2.blurb: Clinical trials report significant hearing improvement in adults over 65 within weeks.

advance3.title: Mediterranean diet slows cognitive decline
advance3.blurb: WHO-backed study links olive oil and leafy greens to sharper memory in older adults.

advance4.title: New wearable detects early-stage atrial fibrillation
advance4.blurb: Smartwatch algorithm outperforms standard ECG in identifying irregular heartbeat early.

meds.headline:
Need help with
your medications?
headlines:
I'm here to help
with your medications

I can check if your
medicines work together

I can suggest natural
remedies for you

I can help you order
prescriptions online

I can compare pharmacy
prices for you

I'll share the latest
medicine research with you

I can help you keep
your health routine on track
meds.noMedsSub: Use the button below to add your medications by voice
meds.refillReminderSub: Set up a reminder for your next refill
meds.interactionsSub: Add your medications to check for interactions
meds.toastAddedDesc: {{name}} has been added to your list.

interactions.label: Check Interactions
interactions.prompt: I take the following medications: {{medNames}}. Please check for any known interactions between these medications and let me know if anything I should discuss with my doctor or pharmacist.

naturalMedicine.label: Natural Medicine
naturalMedicine.prompt: I take the following medications: {{medNames}}. Can you share information about herbal remedies, natural supplements, or plant-based wellness options that might complement my health? Please also let me know if any common natural remedies could interact with my current medications, so I can stay safe.

advances.label: Latest Advances
advances.prompt: I take the following medications: {{medNames}}. Can you give me a friendly summary of any recent research or news about these medications? I'd like to stay informed about advances that might be relevant to my health.

notes.dueEvening: Due this evening at 19:00 · I'll remind you

meds.disclaimer: This is information only, not medical advice — always check with your doctor or pharmacist.
meds.assistantError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
meds.adherenceReportSub: See how consistently you take your medications

adherence.title: Adherence Report
adherence.noDataSub: Your adherence history will appear here as you confirm doses over time.
adherence.shareCopiedDesc: Your adherence summary has been copied to the clipboard.
adherence.shareFormat:
Medication Adherence Report

This week: {{week}}%
Last 30 days: {{month}}%

Per medication:
{{meds}}

Generated by VYVA
adherence.errorSub: Please try again in a moment.

activity.headline: Your activity
activity.progressPct: {{pct}}% of your daily goal — keep going!
activity.tapUpdate: Tap 'Update Steps' to record today's steps
activity.logToStart: Log an activity above to get started!

family.title: Family member or friend
family.sub: Son, daughter, spouse, sibling, friend, neighbour. Gets wellbeing summaries — you control the detail.

carer.title: Caregiver
carer.sub: Professional or primary carer. Can receive safety, medication, and health alerts.

doctor.title: Doctor or specialist
doctor.sub: GP, cardiologist, pharmacist. Can view health reports when you enable it.

careTeam.errorMessage: There was a problem connecting. Please check your connection and try again.
careTeam.rosterSubtitle: People you've added to support you. You control exactly what each person can see.
careTeam.rosterInfoBanner: Change what each person can see any time in Settings → Privacy & consent.
careTeam.confirmRemoveAccess: Remove {{name}}'s access? They'll no longer receive any updates.
careTeam.confirmCancelInvite: Cancel {{name}}'s invitation? The link will stop working.
careTeam.toastRemoveError: Could not remove care team member

step1.heading: 👥 Add someone to your care team
step1.subtitle: You decide exactly what each person can see. Nothing is shared until you confirm.
step1.infoBanner: All sharing is under your control. You can change or remove access at any time in Settings → Privacy & consent.

step2.heading: About them
step2.subtitle: Tell us who you're adding.
step2.placeholderWhatsapp: Leave blank if same as phone

step3.heading: What can {{name}} see?
step3.subtitle: You decide. Toggle on what you're comfortable sharing. Change any time in Settings.
step3.toggleDailySummaryDesc: A short daily update — how you're feeling, whether you spoke to VYVA
step3.toggleMoodDesc: If VYVA detects you're feeling low or anxious
step3.toggleMedicationDesc: Notified if you miss a dose
step3.toggleHealthReportsDesc: Detailed health summaries including conditions and vitals
step3.toggleVitalSignsDesc: Heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen levels from your devices
step3.toggleCognitiveDesc: How you're doing in brain training sessions
step3.toggleEmergencyDesc: Called immediately if VYVA detects a fall or emergency
step3.toggleInactivityDesc: If VYVA hasn't heard from you for an unusual amount of time
step3.toggleDashboardDesc: {{name}} can log in to view a summary of your health and activities
step3.footerNote: Change these any time in Settings → Privacy & consent

step4.heading: Invite {{name}} to connect
step4.subtitle: We'll send {{name}} a message explaining VYVA and what you've chosen to share. They must accept before anything is visible.
step4.messagePreview: Hi {{name}} — your family member has set up VYVA, an AI companion that supports their daily wellbeing. They'd like to share daily updates with you. Tap the link below to accept and create your free account.

step5.heading: {{name}} has been invited
step5.subtitle: Once {{name}} accepts, they'll see only what you've chosen to share. You'll be notified when they join.
step5.infoBanner: {{name}} cannot see anything until they accept. If they don't accept within 7 days, the link expires automatically.

proxySetup.heading: Who is setting this up?
proxySetup.description: We'll record that this profile was set up on someone's behalf. The person it belongs to can confirm it when they're ready.
proxySetup.infoBox: Heads up: the person you're setting this up for will be shown a confirmation screen before VYVA goes live for them. They can also confirm it later from the profile page.
proxySetup.error: Something went wrong — please try again.

scamGuard.activityTileSubtitle: Get live help with calls, documents & messages
scamGuard.headline: Concierge
scamGuard.subtitle: Get live help with calls, documents and messages
scamGuard.scanSubtitle: Photo a letter, email printout or text screenshot
scamGuard.noHistory: No checks yet. Photo a suspicious document to get started.
scamGuard.errorExplanation: We could not analyse this document. If you are concerned, do not share personal information and call 0808 250 5050 (free UK scam helpline).
scamGuard.errorStep1: Do not share personal or financial information.
scamGuard.errorStep2: Ask a trusted person to review it.
scamGuard.callCompanionSubtitle: Get live guidance during a suspicious call
scamGuard.callCompanionDesc: Start VYVA on your phone while taking a suspicious call. Ask VYVA what to say, what to watch out for, and whether to hang up.

gate.title: Discover your community

consent.title: Join your community
consent.bullet1: You will be able to connect with people who share your interests and hobbies.
consent.bullet2: VYVA guides every first introduction — your phone number and personal contact details are never shared directly.
